# PingMyStock

> PingMyStock is a back-in-stock notification app for Shopify. When a sold-out product is restocked, it emails the shoppers who asked to be notified, logs every send with its delivery status, alerts the merchant straight away if a send fails, and shows a dashboard of the dollar value of demand waiting on each out-of-stock product. Free to install on the Shopify App Store.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://pingmystock.com/): What PingMyStock does, who it is for, and how the send-tracking and demand-dashboard features work.
- [Appikon alternative](https://pingmystock.com/appikon-alternative.html): For Shopify stores moving off Appikon's back-in-stock app, a reliable replacement with proof of every send and a dashboard of the demand waiting on each sold-out item.
- [Shopify App Store listing](https://apps.shopify.com/pingmystock): Install PingMyStock free on a Shopify store.
- [Privacy policy](https://pingmystock.com/privacy.html): How PingMyStock handles store and shopper data.

## Details

- Platform: Shopify. Categories: back-in-stock alerts, restock notifications, out-of-stock waitlist.
- Pricing: free to install.
- Built for merchants who want proof their restock emails actually send, an instant alert if one fails, and a clear view of the revenue waiting on each sold-out product.
- Contact: hello@pingmystock.com
